title: Neco Arc Netherite
description: Replaces netherite items of undying with funny Neco Arc because she is very funny
body:
![neco arc rp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7ae9e5587f0aeb5c64adaab5062ae3c3535ccf.jpeg)Replaces netherite items textures with Neco Arc.

Заменяет текстуры незеритовых предметов на смешную кошечку Неко Арк буреня.
